channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: CMU men's lacrosse escapes Concorida as Maverick women dominate CSU Pueblo
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Colorado Mesa's Men's Lacrosse team looked in full control on their way to a sixth win when they held a 7-3 second-half lead over RMAC foe Concordia University Irvine. Then came a Golden Eagle onslaught. Three quick goals and CUI was within one.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Betts hits winning 3-run homer in 10th as Dodgers beat Tigers 8-5 for first 4-0 start since 1981
item.description: Mookie Betts hit a game-winning, three-run homer in the 10th inning, lifting the Dodgers to an 8-5 win over the Detroit Tigers when Los Angeles received its 2024 World Series rings.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Milos Uzan's late bucket on inbound play sends Houston into Elite Eight with 62-60 win over Purdue
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Milos Uzan soared for an uncontested layup on a beautifully executed inbound play with 0.9 seconds left, and No. 1 seed Houston survived a late collapse to beat fourth-seeded Purdue 62-60 on Friday night in the Sweet 16 of the NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auburn’s explosive 39-17 run topples Michigan basketball, sending Tigers to Elite 8
item.description: The No. 5 seed Michigan Wolverines have been eliminated by the No. 1 seed Auburn Tigers 78-65, snapping their five-game winning streak in the process.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Auburn’s explosive 38-17 run topples Michigan basketball, sending Tigers to Elite 8
item.description: The No. 5 seed Michigan Wolverines have been eliminated by the No. 1 seed Auburn Tigers 78-65, snapping their five-game winning streak in the process.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Juan Soto slugs first homer for Mets in win against Astros
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — After slugging his first home run with the New York Mets on Friday night, Juan Soto insisted he isn’t burdened by the lofty expectations to perform after signing his record deal.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tennessee is heading back to the Elite Eight as defense clamps down in 78-65 win over Kentucky
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Those two regular-season losses to Kentucky don't mean anything to Tennessee now. The Volunteers avenged them in convincing fashion on the big stage of the NCAA Tournament on Friday night, posting a no-doubt 78-65 victory that sent them to a second consecutive Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bling, bling: Dodgers show off glittering World Series rings in pregame ceremony
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani and Clayton Kershaw joined their Los Angeles Dodgers teammates in sticking their fists out to show off their glittering World Series rings in a ceremony Friday night.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan State's 2nd-half rally sends Spartans past Ole Miss 73-70 as Izzo wins again in Sweet 16
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jase Richardson's hot shooting helped Michigan State overcome a poor start and move into another Elite Eight, though the Spartans need at least one more win for a real celebration. “We don’t put up any banners for Elite Eights,” coach Tom Izzo said.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Welcome Down Under: Russian-born Daria Kasatkina becomes an Australian citizen
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Russian-born tennis player Daria Kasatkina says she is switching allegiances to Australia after her application for permanent residency was accepted by the Australian government.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Falcons' Kirk Cousins sparks trade rumors with trip to Cleveland
item.description: Quarterback Kirk Cousins didn't attempt to hide his offseason travels after he was pictured at several restaurants in Cleveland this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Morrow, Williams and LSU return to Elite Eight with 80-73 March Madness win over N.C. State
item.description: Aneesah Morrow had 30 points and 19 rebounds, Kailyn Gilbert had a critical block that set up Mikaylah Williams' a go-ahead layup with 1:07 remaining, and No. 3 seed LSU rallied past second-seeded N.
item.dc:creator: Henry Krueger, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bill Belichick, girlfriend Jordon Hudson team up to mock Falcons over infamous Super Bowl loss
item.description: Bill Belichick still appears to hold a grudge against the Falcons since they decided against hiring him as their coach. So, he trolled them over their infamous Super Bowl loss.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MiLaysia Fulwiley helps defending champion South Carolina outlast Maryland 71-67 in March Madness
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — MiLaysia Fulwiley scored 23 points, including a go-ahead layup with 2:22 left, and Chloe Kitts added 15 points and 11 rebounds to help No. 1 seed South Carolina beat fourth-seeded Maryland 71-67 on Friday in the Sweet 16 of the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Charles Barkley calls Stephen A Smith 'lame and weak' after ESPN star fires back at LeBron James
item.description: Basketball Hall of Famer Charles Barkley gave his take on the feud between ESPN's Stephen A. Smith and Los Angeles Lakers star LeBron James.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UConn star Paige Bueckers will enter 2025 WNBA Draft
item.description: UConn star Paige Bueckers will enter the 2025 WNBA Draft after four seasons with the Huskies. She will enter the draft once the team's tournament run is over, Bueckers told ESPN.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: California lawmaker warns Democrats of consequences for not protecting girls' sports from trans athletes
item.description: California Assemblywoman Kate Sanchez spoke to Fox News Digital about her trans athlete ban bill ahead of its vote on Tuesday amid a nationwide debate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL prospect Desmond Watson seeks to become heaviest player drafted in league history
item.description: Football linemen are typical among the biggest athletes on a team, but former Florida defender Desmond Watson's size and strength are exceptional.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Baseball: Point Loma 13, Montgomery 6
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Out on the point a high scoring baseball game between Point Loma and Montgomery. The Pointers hold on to win 13-6. Point Loma jumped out to an 8-2 lead, but Montgomery quickly scored four runs to cut it to 8-6.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Royal Riot Podcast Exclusive: Ariath Piol talks goals, red cards, and his journey to RSL
item.description: Royal Riot Podcast hosts Hayden and Mattey sit down with Ariath Piol in an exclusive interview where the player opens up about his journey to RSL, the emotions, lessons, and support he has received from the club and more.
item.dc:creator: Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Baseball: Southwest 7, Crawford 0
item.description: Baseball time on Tuesday afternoon with Crawford hosting Southwest. The Raiders won 7-0. Sebestian Martinez was stellar on the bump for the Raiders complete game shutout scattering five hits with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Will Applegate: Why Grand Junction's three-sport star chose baseball and his legacy on GJHS
item.description: Few local high school athletes have made an impact quite like Grand Junction High School's Will Applegate.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Runnin' Utes name Chris Wilcox general manager
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah head men's basketball coach Alex Jensen continues to fill his staff, announcing the addition of Sacramento Kings Assistant GM Wes Wilcox as the newest general manager for the Runnin' Utes program.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rays prepare for Tampa home opener
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Tampa Bay Rays have their home opener for their season at Steinbrenner Field on Friday. The game is already a sell out. Seating capacity at this years games will be greatly reduced, due to major hurricane damage at Tropicana Field.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Tony Finau out to win second Houston Open
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - Utah native Tony Finau came into this year after going through two pretty big life events. The first was knee surgery back in December.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Warriors' Stephen Curry won't play in Miami, 2nd straight game missed with pelvic contusion
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Stephen Curry is going to take a little more time to heal. Curry remained out of Golden State's lineup Tuesday night for a game against the Miami Heat, the second straight game he has missed with a pelvic contusion.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Bryan Hodgson named University of South Florida head men's basketball coach
item.description: Bryan Hodgson, one of the nation’s top recruiters and a rising head coach, has been named the University of South Florida head men’s basketball coach, Vice President for Athletics Michael Kelly announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Merissa Lynn, USF Athletics, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Late boxing legend George Foreman had deep ties to this East Bay city
item.description: (KRON) -- Boxing legend and former heavyweight champion George Foreman died last Friday at the age of 76. Foreman was born in Texas. However, after a troubled upbringing, he then moved to the West Coast after ninth grade when he enrolled in President Lyndon B. Johnson's Job Corps work program.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Stephen Curry listed as questionable for Golden State's Tuesday game in Miami
item.description: Stephen Curry is back with the Golden State Warriors after missing the first game of the team's road trip with a pelvic contusion, and could play when his team takes on the Miami Heat in Jimmy Butler's return game Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Koby Brea leads the way as Kentucky beats Illinois 84-75 for first Sweet 16 appearance since 2019
item.description: Koby Brea matched a career high with 23 points and Kentucky beat Illinois 84-75 on Sunday to advance beyond the NCAA Tournament’s opening weekend for the first time since they reached the Elite Eight in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James' return from injury spoiled by Bulls' phenomenal effort in 146-115 win over Lakers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James' return from a seven-game absence was the dominant storyline, to say the least, when the Bulls got ready to face the Lakers in Los Angeles on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Red Rocks win Big 12 Championship
item.description: WEST VALLEY CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah claimed the Big 12 regular season and Championship titles during its debut season in the Conference after the Red Rocks tallied a score of 197.775 at the 2025 Big 12 Gymnastics Championship held at the Maverik Center in West Valley City, Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC are headed to the Lone Star State to take on Austin FC
item.description: San Diego FC are gearing up for Matchday 5 of the MLS season, which will see them head to the Texas capital to take on Austin FC at 1:00 p.m. on Sunday March 23rd.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5
